title: National Level IV umpires qualification for Lyndon Volkwyn
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - One of SWD's top...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - One of SWD's top cricket umpires, Lyndon Volkwyn (pictured), has successfully completed the Cricket South Africa Level IV national certificate.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - One of SWD's top cricket umpires, Lyndon Volkwyn (pictured), has successfully completed the Cricket South Africa Level IV national certificate."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"During the past few years, Volkwyn has officiated in numerous Cricket South Africa tournaments, where he often received recognition to umpire in the finals."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is the top umpire qualification in the country and will allow Volkwyn, a former first-class cricket player, to be added as a CSA panel umpire.","html":"This is the top umpire qualification in the country and will allow Volkwyn, a former first-class cricket player, to be added as a CSA panel umpire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: National Level IV umpires qualification for Lyndon Volkwyn
